title: For the Crown
description:
For the Crown is a puzzle logistics builder where every building placement matters.

Guide lemming-like workers through increasingly complex production chains as you transform a small island into a thriving kingdom. Gather resources, manufacture advanced goods and upgrade your castle while working within one important limitation:

The island never gets bigger! Your logistics problems do!

Every new building consumes valuable space. Every production chain creates new logistical challenges. The more successful your kingdom becomes, the more difficult it is to keep everything organized.

What starts as a simple settlement gradually turns into a dense network of workers, resources and production lines competing for the same limited space.

Workers With Minds Of Their Own

Workers are not directly controlled.

Once spawned, they simply walk forward until they encounter roads, signs, stairways or buildings.

Like tiny medieval lemmings, they depend entirely on the systems you create for them.

A well-designed kingdom runs smoothly.

A poorly designed kingdom quickly turns into complete chaos.

Create Production Chains

Transform basic resources into increasingly valuable products.

Connect dozens of buildings together to create efficient production networks and unlock new possibilities for expanding your castle.

As production grows, so does the complexity of your logistics.

Limited Space, Unlimited Problems

The biggest challenge is often your own kingdom.

Buildings cannot be moved freely and the island has limited room for expansion.

A shortcut built early might become an obstacle later. A perfect layout can slowly evolve into a logistical nightmare.

Finding clever ways to save space, build vertically and keep workers moving efficiently is the key to success.

Grow Your Castle

Deliver valuable goods to your castle and unlock new tiers of buildings, resources and production chains.

Each upgrade opens new opportunities while demanding even more from your growing logistics network.

Castle Specializations

Choose between four different castle types, each offering unique advantages as your kingdom expands.

Different specializations encourage different production priorities and reward alternative approaches to building your economy.

What For the Crown offers

• Puzzle-focused logistics gameplay

• Lemming-inspired worker behavior

• 38 interconnected production chains

• 4 unique castle specializations

• Vertical construction with stairways, platforms and drops

• Limited island space that rewards careful planning

• Increasing complexity driven by player decisions

• Relaxing gameplay with deep optimization challenges

• A unique blend of factory building and puzzle solving 

Build your production network, expand your castle and discover how efficient your kingdom can become.
description_short: A puzzle logistics builder where lemming-like workers transport resources across a limited island. Create production chains, optimize routes, upgrade your castle and solve increasingly complex space and logistics challenges. The island never gets bigger. Your logistics problems do.
